summary: Redesigned the follow-up page template in generateFollowUpPageSource(). Fixed X/Twitter SVG icon (was duplicating LinkedIn SVG). Added Discord hero CTA section with dedicated DiscordIcon component and Discord-branded purple accent. Enhanced header with ambient logo glow effect. Upgraded callback CTA with glowing phone icon and rounded-2xl card. Improved footer note copy ('No templates, no delays. That's the kind of thing Zo builds for you.'). Added staggered section fade-in delays (100-350ms) for cascading reveal on scroll. Added copyright line. Increased touch targets for mobile (py-2 on social pills, p-3.5 on community links, p-5 on callback). All URLs already in EMAIL_WHITELIST. FollowUpPageData interface unchanged — no structural changes needed since socialLinks, communityLinks, showLogo, and callbackNumber fields already existed.
sections_added: DiscordIcon component (dedicated SVG, Discord brand color #5865F2)
Discord hero CTA card (gradient background, 'You're not in this alone' heading)
Callback CTA glow effect (blur-sm with hover state)
sections_enhanced: Header: larger logo (w-12), font-bold amber-400 title, subtitle with date, subheading copy
Community: rounded-2xl gradient card, Discord icon + description, ArrowRight hover arrows
Callback: rounded-2xl amber-tinted card, glowing phone icon, larger touch target
Footer note: enhanced copy with linked 'Zo Computer', more evocative language
Social links: py-2 touch targets, gap-2 spacing, hover amber transitions
bugs_fixed: X/Twitter SVG icon was using LinkedIn SVG path (duplicate). Replaced with correct X mark SVG (M18.901 1.153h3.68l-8.04...)

social_links.label: X / Twitter
social_links.note: V's handle defaulted to @vibethinker — needs confirmation

interface_changes: None — FollowUpPageData already had socialLinks, communityLinks, showLogo, callbackNumber fields. Defaults in generateFollowUpPageSource updated.
whitelist_changes: None needed — all URLs use domains already in EMAIL_WHITELIST (zocomputer.com, discord.gg, x.com, linkedin.com, vrijenattawar.com, support.zocomputer.com)
open_questions: V's X handle defaulted to @vibethinker — needs confirmation before production
Any additional social links to include?
artifacts: zo.space route: /hotline/test-d4-preview (test page — can be deleted after review)
learnings: The original X/Twitter SocialIcon was using the LinkedIn SVG path — both platform branches had identical SVGs. The correct X mark path is M18.901 1.153h3.68l-8.04... This was a copy-paste bug from the original v6 build.

FollowUpPageData interface already had all the fields the brief specified (socialLinks, communityLinks, showLogo, callbackNumber) — the work was purely template-level visual redesign, not data model changes.
Staggered IntersectionObserver delays (delay prop on Section) create a nice cascading reveal effect on mobile scroll without adding any external dependencies or performance cost.

Template literal escaping in generateFollowUpPageSource requires careful handling: \\\` for backticks inside the returned template string, \\u2019 for unicode escapes. The splice approach (Python script to replace line ranges) is safer than edit_file_llm for functions this large (~250 lines).
